items.reasoning: Lane sustain against Pudge Rot trades and BH Shuriken Toss harass.
+2 damage for mid CS wars; instant 85 HP heal survives a surprise Meat Hook.
2x branches for +2 all stats; builds into Magic Wand after ganker reveals.
+3 INT for last hit damage; Storm's base damage needs help early.
Pudge Rot + BH Shuriken spam generate constant charges. Wand saves lives against gank attempts.
INT treads for mana-efficient Remnant farming; STR treads when ganked.
Mana efficiency for Overload farming. Every point of INT matters for Ball Lightning range.
5-second silence prevents Pudge Dismember and BH Track escape. +40 AS for Overload procs.
Prevents Dismember stun and BH Track slow during teamfights. Storm needs uninterrupted Ball Lightning.
Orchid upgrade -- 100% crit on silenced target destroys BH; Soul Rend procs on every Overload.
AoE blast reveals invis BH and slows Pudge approach. +15 armor vs physical gank damage.
Blocks single-target Dismember initiation; passive mana regen sustains Ball Lightning.
Self-cyclone dodges Meat Hook, purges Track debuff. Mana regen for Ball Lightning.

recommendation.overall_strategy: Play safe in lane with vision on Pudge hook angles. Once Orchid online, Storm becomes the ganker -- silence BH before he Tracks, pick off Pudge before Dismember. BKB timing is critical to avoid chain-stun gank setups. Shiva's Guard reveals invis heroes in teamfights.
